_comment.1: DETERMINATION: which soundcard channel (L=vector[0], R=vector[1]) moves
_comment.2: the beam's y axis. Short latency_test: I only need the CALIBRATION line
_comment.3: (step / step-sigma / gain px-per-cmd), which is logged BEFORE any abort,
_comment.4: so it reports for either channel whether or not the 8-sigma gate passes.
_comment.5: Run once with index_cmd 0 (L) and once with index_cmd 1 (R), both watching
_comment.6: index_err 0 (CoM y). Whichever gives the larger |gain| is the y channel.
_comment.7: period 0.02 s (50 Hz square): fast enough that the AC-coupled step has NOT
_comment.8: decayed by the settled window -- the 0.15 s runs earlier failed for that
_comment.9: reason (step 10x below noise). Piplate PARKED holding the 2 V coarse +
_comment.10: x-fine bias so the beam sits on-sensor while only the soundcard moves y.
